message.content:
@startuml
' UML Diagram: FalsePositiveJobDataService and related components

package "com" {
  package "mercedesbenz" {
    package "sechub" {
      package "domain" {
        package "scan" {
          package "project" {
            class "FalsePositiveJobDataService" as FPDService {
              + scanReportRepository : scanReportRepository
              + configService : configService
              + falsePositiveJobDataListValidation : falsePositiveJobDataListValidation
              + merger : merger
            }

            class "ScanProjectConfigService" as SPConfigService {
              + repository : repository
            }

            class "ScanProjectConfig" as SPConfig {
            }

            class "ScanProjectConfigRepository" as SPConfigRepository {
            }

            class "FalsePositiveJobDataList" as FPJDL {
              - apiVersion : String
              - type : String
              - jobData : FalsePositiveJobData
            }

            class "FalsePositiveJobDataConfigMerger" as FPJDCMerger {
            }

            class "FalsePositiveProjectConfiguration" as FPProjectConfig {
              - falsePositives : List<FalsePositiveEntry>
            }

            class "FalsePositiveEntry" as FPEntry {
              - jobData : FalsePositiveJobData
              - author : String
              - metaData : FalsePositiveMetaData
              - created : Date
            }

            class "FalsePositiveJobData" as FPJobData {
              - jobUUID : UUID
              - comment : String
            }

            class "FalsePositiveMetaData" as FPMetaData {
              - scanType : ScanType
              - name : String
              - severity : Severity
              - code : FalsePositiveCodeMetaData
              - web : FalsePositiveWebMetaData
              - cveld : Integer
              - cveid : String
              - owasp : String
            }

            class "FalsePositiveCodeMetaData" as FPCodeMetaData {
              - start : FalsePositiveCodePartMetaData
              - end : FalsePositiveCodePartMetaData
            }

            class "FalsePositiveCodePartMetaData" as FPCodePartMetaData {
              - location : String
              - relevantPart : String
              - sourceCode : String
            }

            class "FalsePositiveWebRequestMetaData" as FPWebRequestMetaData {
              - method : String
              - target : String
              - protocol : String
              - version : String
              - attackVector : String
            }

            class "FalsePositiveWebResponseMetaData" as FPWebResponseMetaData {
              - evidence : String
              - statuscode : int
            }

            class "FalsePositiveWebMetaData" as FPWebMetaData {
              - request : FalsePositiveWebRequestMetaData
              - response : FalsePositiveWebResponseMetaData
            }
          }

          package "report" {
            class "ScanSecHubReport" as SSR {
            }

            class "ScanReportRepository" as SRR {
            }
          }
        }
      }
    }
  }
  package "commons" {
    package "model" {
      class "Severity" as Sev {
      }

      class "ScanType" as ST {
      }

      class "SecHubCodeCallStack" as SHCCS {
      }

      class "SecHubFinding" as SHF {
      }
    }
  }
}

' Relationships
FPDService --> SPConfigService
FPDService --> SPConfigRepository
FPDService --> FPJDCMerger
FPDService --> falsePositiveJobDataListValidation
FPDService --> merger
SPConfigService --> SPConfig
SPConfigService --> SPConfigRepository

FPJDCMerger --> FPEntry
FPJDCMerger --> FPJobData
FPJDCMerger --> FPCodeMetaData
